Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior. Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemddb3d7d9b47cd0bd0516b5ac5316d430b8679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceadmin2026-06-05 10:45:0509d0682947d14f14516b5ac5316d435b32913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d43012913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d4301sp_instance_09d0682947d14f14516b5ac5316d435badmin2026-06-08 15:44:13<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<footer class="pulse-footer"> <div class="footer-container"> <div class="footer-brand"> <h3>❤️ Pulse Pharmacy</h3> <p>Your Health, Our Beat</p> </div> <div class="footer-links"><a href="/pp">Home</a> <a href="/pp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=66570a20479d0714516b5ac5316d434d">Request Medicine</a> <a href="/pp?id=my_requests">My Requests</a> <a href="/pp?id=form&table=incident&sys_id=-1&view=sp&sysparm_view_forced=true">Report a Problem</a></div> <div class="footer-contact"> <p>]]>📍<![CDATA[ 15 El-Tahrir St, Cairo, Egypt</p> <p>]]>📞<![CDATA[ 123-456-789</p> <p>✉️ care@pulse-pharmacy.com</p> </div> </div> <div class="footer-copyright"> <p>© 2025 Pulse Pharmacy. All rights reserved.</p> </div> </footer> <style> .pulse-footer { background-color: #0F172A; color: #94A3B8; padding: 40px 20px 20px; margin-top: 60px; border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .footer-container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; padding-bottom: 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1E293B; } .footer-brand h3 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: -0.3px; } .footer-brand p { font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8; } .footer-links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; align-items: center; } .footer-links a { color: #CBD5E1; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #E60000; } .footer-contact p { margin: 4px 0; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8; } .footer-copyright { text-align: center; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #64748B; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-container { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; gap: 20px; } .footer-links { justify-content: center; } .footer-contact { text-align: center; } } </style>", "displayValue": "<footer class="pulse-footer"> <div class="footer-container"> <div class="footer-brand"> <h3>❤️ Pulse Pharmacy</h3> <p>Your Health, Our Beat</p> </div> <div class="footer-links"><a href="/pp">Home</a> <a href="/pp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=66570a20479d0714516b5ac5316d434d">Request Medicine</a> <a href="/pp?id=my_requests">My Requests</a> <a href="/pp?id=form&table=incident&sys_id=-1&view=sp&sysparm_view_forced=true">Report a Problem</a></div> <div class="footer-contact"> <p>]]>📍<![CDATA[ 15 El-Tahrir St, Cairo, Egypt</p> <p>]]>📞<![CDATA[ 123-456-789</p> <p>✉️ care@pulse-pharmacy.com</p> </div> </div> <div class="footer-copyright"> <p>© 2025 Pulse Pharmacy. All rights reserved.</p> </div> </footer> <style> .pulse-footer { background-color: #0F172A; color: #94A3B8; padding: 40px 20px 20px; margin-top: 60px; border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .footer-container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; padding-bottom: 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1E293B; } .footer-brand h3 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: -0.3px; } .footer-brand p { font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8; } .footer-links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; align-items: center; } .footer-links a { color: #CBD5E1; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #E60000; } .footer-contact p { margin: 4px 0; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8; } .footer-copyright { text-align: center; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #64748B; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-container { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; gap: 20px; } .footer-links { justify-content: center; } .footer-contact { text-align: center; } } </style>" } }]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=09d0682947d14f14516b5ac5316d435b"/></record_update>
